sprint.goal: Validate Go kernel→Cloud telemetry E2E pipeline (workspace #60, due Apr 17). KE-2 unblock. Swarm health resolution.

kernel-squad-developer.task: Fix #1208 (heredoc false-positive self-mod block) — PR #1213 was closed without merging due to conflicts with #1212. Re-implement per-token command scanning + heredoc-body stripping in packages/invariants/src/definitions.ts:1229. Also fix #1209 (MCP server prefix match in aab.ts).

kernel-sr.task: Assign and unblock KE-2 (ActionContext, issue #917) — 0/4 checkboxes, no PR. This is v3.0 critical path and root cause of #1202 (3,825+ unintended denials).

cloud-squad.task: Upgrade agentguard-cloud from 2.8.0 to 2.8.5. Now 5 versions behind. Includes: graceful SQLite fallback, report_intent allow rule, self-mod invariant scoping, --store none flag fix.

resolved_this_cycle.resolution: Fixed by PR #1212 (merged c3e0337) — .agentguard/persona.env exempted from self-mod invariant. Closed 2026-03-28T11:25Z.
report_intent fixed in v2.8.5 (PR #1212, released 2026-03-28T11:01Z). Issues closed this cycle.
github.pr.* rules already present in agent-guard agentguard.yaml; cloud fixed via PR #490. Closed.
Informational reports closed as documentation artifacts.

blockers.description: Swarm health P0 — ongoing 15h+. 85.7% agents stuck. Human intervention required: git worktree prune, PID cleanup, cron collision fix.
AAB normalization gap — 3,825+ unintended denials in 5.5 days. rtk-prefixed commands misclassified as unknown. Root cause of inflated 18.2% denial rate. Requires KE-2 (ActionContext) for full fix.
KE-2 stalling — no assignee, 0/4 checkboxes. v3.0 critical path. 3rd consecutive cycle unstarted.
Heredoc false-positive self-mod block — PR #1213 closed without merging (conflict with #1212). Follow-up PR needed. Impacts scheduled agents writing reports via heredoc.
MCP server exact-match failure — github-mcp-server-* tools blocked despite allow rule for github-mcp-server. Fix: prefix/startsWith matching in aab.ts.

prQueue.notes: Queue is clean. PR #1150 (Studio EM report) was previously open — confirm with studio-em if still active or can be closed.
